headline: Google is open-sourcing its 3D emoji
summary: Google is now open-sourcing its 3D emoji, allowing public use in new creations. The company shared design insights on World Emoji Day. This move addresses unique challenges in designing for 3D versus 2D platforms.

headline: GoPro's discounted Max 2 bundle includes $100 worth of accessories
summary: The GoPro Max 2 accessory bundle is significantly discounted to $369. This offer provides $100 worth of accessories with the 360-degree camera. The deal is available at Amazon, Best Buy, and GoPro, offering great value.

headline: The Guardian's Carter Sherman fondly remembers being terrified by Ocarina of Time
summary: Acclaimed reporter Carter Sherman reflects on her childhood fear of Ocarina of Time. Sherman has a distinguished career covering complex social and political issues. The piece explores her personal connection to the iconic Nintendo game.

headline: Surprise! Facial recognition smart locks are actually good
summary: Facial recognition smart locks deliver a seamless, hands-free unlocking experience. They eliminate the need for passcodes or fumbling with keys. This technology significantly enhances convenience and smart home integration.

headline: Christopher Nolan's Take on the Gods of The Odyssey Is the Key to Unlocking the Film's Biggest Mystery
summary: Christopher Nolan's film, 'The Odyssey,' uses ancient Greek gods to unlock its central mystery. Zendaya's character, Athena, is crucial to understanding 'Zeus' Law' within the narrative. The article delves into Nolan's unique mythological interpretations in the film.

headline: Christopher Nolan Says It Will Be 'At Least' 3 Years Before We See His Next Film, After The Odyssey Pushed Him to His Limits
summary: Christopher Nolan confirmed his next movie is at least three years away. Directing 'The Odyssey' proved incredibly demanding and pushed him to his limits. The acclaimed filmmaker needs a significant break after the intense production.

headline: Jennifer English Steps Away From Tides of Annihilation Role Due to Health Concerns
summary: Actress Jennifer English has withdrawn from her role in 'Tides of Annihilation.' She is stepping away due to pressing health concerns. English was set to portray the protagonist in Eclipse Glow Games' upcoming title.

headline: Colman Domingo and Robert O'Hara in Talks to Write Live-Action Princess and the Frog Tiana Spinoff Movie
summary: Colman Domingo and Robert O'Hara are in talks to co-write a Tiana spinoff film. The project is a live-action movie based on Disney's 'Princess and the Frog.' It will focus on the beloved character, Tiana Rogers.

headline: Burnham to announce plans for new North Sea oil and gas drilling
summary: Andy Burnham is expected to reveal plans for new North Sea oil and gas drilling. This announcement follows Labour's 2024 manifesto pledge against new licenses. The move marks a potentially controversial shift in energy policy.

headline: Ruthless plotter? Flip-flopper? Dad dancer? Insiders reveal the real Andy Burnham
summary: Laura Kuenssberg's investigation uncovers the authentic personality of Andy Burnham. Over 20 insiders share diverse insights into his political style and character. The report aims to paint a comprehensive picture of the influential politician.

headline: Burnham is 'people pleaser' with 'airy fairy' plans, says Kemi Badenoch
summary: Kemi Badenoch criticized Andy Burnham, labelling him a 'people pleaser' with 'airy fairy' plans. Speaking to Laura Kuenssberg, Badenoch accused him of misjudging national priorities. Her comments highlight a sharp political attack on the incoming leader.

headline: Britain's Kerr breaks 27-year mile world record in London
summary: Great Britain's Josh Kerr shattered the men's mile world record. His spectacular performance took place at the London Diamond League. Kerr's achievement breaks a 27-year-old record in athletics.
